description: Gentle, imaginative bedtime fantasy stories for young children (ages 3-8). Each entry is a complete story designed to help children relax, feel safe, and drift to sleep. Written at a level accessible to preschoolers — simple words, short sentences, and clear ideas that even a 3-year-old being read to can follow.

narrator.name: The Storyteller
narrator.description: A warm, velvety voice reading a bedtime story by a cozy fire. Gentle, nurturing, and magical. Speaks as though tucking a child into bed.
rules: Write for YOUNG CHILDREN (ages 3-8) — use simple, everyday words only
Short sentences. No sentence longer than 15 words.
No complex vocabulary — if a 4-year-old wouldn't know the word, don't use it
Slow pacing with natural breathing pauses
Slight magical whimsy — Disney-like but calmer
Use soft descriptive language: glowing, drifting, quiet, warm
Avoid sharp, loud, or harsh words
Keep sentences rhythmic and flowing — like a parent reading aloud
No intense danger, villains, or frightening imagery
Emotional emphasis on kindness, bravery, and friendship
Ending should always encourage sleep and safety
Use repetition gently for comfort (like real bedtime stories do)
Name characters with simple, fun names kids can remember

opening_format.template:
In a quiet corner of the world, where the stars whispered softly... a story begins.

This is the tale of {subject}.
opening_format.notes: Always opens with a calm, inviting scene. Gentle and magical. No channel name — just warmth.

templates: And so, wrapped in warmth and starlight, everything was peaceful once more.
The world grew quiet... and the night held them gently, until morning came.
And with that, the stars smiled down... and it was time to sleep.
closing_format.notes: End with a peaceful resolution that encourages sleep. Always reassuring. Never leave anything unresolved.

visual_theme.style: Soft watercolor fantasy, warm and dreamy, storybook illustration
visual_theme.lighting: Warm, soft, golden glow. Moonlight and lantern light. No harsh shadows.
visual_theme.environment: Magical but safe. Enchanted forests, cozy villages, moonlit meadows. Everything should feel like a place a child would want to visit.
visual_theme.camera: Gentle slow drift. Feels like turning the page of a storybook.
visual_theme.mood: Warm, magical, safe, sleepy, full of wonder
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: soft watercolor illustration, storybook art, warm golden light, dreamy, gentle, children's fantasy, 4k

ambient_audio.style: Gentle music box melody with soft wind chimes and quiet nighttime sounds

default_tags: stories for kids to fall asleep
